explanation: Reordering: The command line reorders the parameters to avoid matching the 'CommandLine|contains: '.exe -i127.0.0.1 -p' pattern by placing the directory argument before the port.
Reordering: The command line reorders the parameters to avoid matching the 'CommandLine|contains: '.exe -i127.0.0.1 -p' pattern by placing the port argument before the IP address.
Insertion: An additional '-v' flag is inserted, which does not alter the core functionality but may change the command line structure enough to avoid the 'CommandLine|contains' match.
